name: listAccounts
title: List Accounts
description: List all email accounts and their identities

name: listFolders
title: List Folders
description: List all mail folders with URIs and message counts

accountId.description: Account ID, email address, or display name to limit results to a single account

folderPath.description: Folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') to list only that folder and its subfolders

name: searchMessages
title: Search Mail
description: Search messages by query, sender, recipient, subject, date range, folder, account, tags, attachments, read/flagged status, or just count them. Results include threadId for conversation grouping (null on EWS accounts). Use getMessage to read full content.

query.description: Text to search in subject, author, or recipients (default: empty, matches all)

from.description: Filter by sender name or email address (substring match)

to.description: Filter by recipient or CC name or email address (substring match)

hasAttachments.description: Only return messages with attachments (default: false)

taggedWith.description: Only return messages with this tag key (e.g. '$label1' for Important)

accountId.description: Account ID, email address, or display name to limit search to a single account. Ignored if folderPath is provided.

folderPath.description: Folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') to limit search to one folder and its subfolders

folderPaths.description: Array of folder URIs or short paths to search across multiple specific folders. Use folderPath or folderPaths, not both.

startDate.description: Filter messages on or after this ISO 8601 date

endDate.description: Filter messages on or before this ISO 8601 date

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50, max 1000)

sortOrder.description: Date sort order: asc (oldest first) or desc (newest first, default)

snippetLength.description: Include a body preview of up to this many characters (default: 0, no snippet)

countOnly.description: Return only the count of matching messages, not the messages themselves (default: false)

name: getMessage
title: Get Message
description: Read the full content of an email message by its ID

saveAttachments.description: If true, save attachments to /tmp/thunderbird-mcp/<messageId>/ and include filePath in response (default: false)

name: listCalendars
title: List Calendars
description: Return the user's calendars

name: createEvent
title: Create Event
description: Create a calendar event.

endDate.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 (defaults to startDate + 1h for timed, +1 day for all-day)

calendarId.description: Target calendar ID (from listCalendars, defaults to first writable calendar)

recurrence.description: iCal RRULE string for repeating events (e.g. 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR' or 'FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15')

name: listEvents
title: List Events
description: List calendar events within a date range

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to query (from listCalendars). If omitted, queries all calendars.

startDate.description: Start of date range in ISO 8601 format (default: now)

endDate.description: End of date range in ISO 8601 format (default: 30 days from startDate)

maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 100)

name: updateEvent
title: Update Event
description: Update an existing calendar event's title, dates, location, or description

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the event (from listEvents results)

startDate.description: New start date/time in ISO 8601 format (optional)

endDate.description: New end date/time in ISO 8601 format (optional)

recurrence.description: New iCal RRULE string (e.g. 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO'), or empty string to remove recurrence

name: deleteEvent
title: Delete Event
description: Delete a calendar event

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the event (from listEvents results)

name: listTasks
title: List Tasks
description: List tasks (todos) from calendars, optionally filtered by date range and completion status

calendarId.description: Calendar ID to query (from listCalendars). If omitted, queries all calendars.

startDate.description: Only include tasks due on or after this ISO 8601 date

endDate.description: Only include tasks due on or before this ISO 8601 date

maxResults.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default: 100)

name: createTask
title: Create Task
description: Create a new task (todo).

calendarId.description: Target calendar ID (from listCalendars, defaults to first writable calendar)

name: updateTask
title: Update Task
description: Update a task's title, due date, description, priority, completion percentage, or status

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the task (from listTasks results)

dueDate.description: New due date in ISO 8601 format, or empty string to clear (optional)

percentComplete.description: Completion percentage 0-100. Setting to 100 marks as completed. (optional)

status.description: Task status: NONE, NEEDS-ACTION, IN-PROCESS, COMPLETED, or CANCELLED (optional)

name: deleteTask
title: Delete Task
description: Delete a task (todo) from a calendar

calendarId.description: The calendar ID containing the task (from listTasks results)

name: searchContacts
title: Search Contacts
description: Find contacts the user interacted with

query.description: Email address or name to search for

name: deleteMessages
title: Delete Messages
description: Delete messages from a folder. Drafts are moved to Trash instead of permanently deleted.

messageIds.description: Array of message IDs to delete

name: updateMessage
title: Update Message
description: Update one or more messages: mark read/unread, flag/unflag, add/remove tags, move, copy, or trash. Supply messageId for a single message or messageIds for bulk operations.

messageId.description: A single message ID (from searchMessages results). Use messageId or messageIds, not both.

messageIds.description: Array of message IDs for bulk operations. Use messageId or messageIds, not both.

read.description: Set to true/false to mark read/unread (optional)

addTags.description: Tag keys to add (e.g. ["$label1", "$label2"]). Standard: $label1=Important, $label2=Work, $label3=Personal, $label4=To Do, $label5=Later

moveTo.description: Destination folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') to move messages to. Only one of moveTo/copyTo/trash allowed.

copyTo.description: Destination folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') to copy messages to. Only one of moveTo/copyTo/trash allowed.

trash.description: Set to true to move messages to Trash. Only one of moveTo/copyTo/trash allowed.

name: createFolder
title: Create Folder
description: Create a new mail subfolder under an existing folder

parentFolderPath.description: Folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') of the parent folder

name: renameFolder
title: Rename Folder
description: Rename an existing mail folder

name: deleteFolder
title: Delete Folder
description: Delete a mail folder. By default moves to Trash; set permanent=true to delete permanently.

permanent.description: If true, permanently delete instead of moving to Trash (default: false)

name: moveFolder
title: Move Folder
description: Move a folder to be a subfolder of a different parent folder

destinationParentPath.description: Folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') of the new parent

name: emptyJunk
title: Empty Junk
description: Permanently delete all messages in the Junk/Spam folder

accountId.description: Account ID, email address, or display name to empty junk for. If omitted, empties junk for all accounts.

name: emptyTrash
title: Empty Trash
description: Permanently delete all messages in the Trash folder

accountId.description: Account ID, email address, or display name to empty trash for. If omitted, empties trash for all accounts.

name: createDraft
title: Create Draft
description: Save a message as a draft without opening a compose window. Can also create a reply draft by providing messageId and folderPath of the original message.

to.description: Recipient email address(es). For replies, defaults to original sender.

subject.description: Email subject. For replies, defaults to 'Re: <original subject>'.

body.description: Email body (your reply text or new message body)

cc.description: CC recipients (comma-separated). For reply-all, defaults to original recipients.

isHtml.description: Whether body is HTML (default: false). Ignored for reply drafts.

from.description: Sender identity (email address or identity ID from listAccounts)

messageId.description: Message ID to reply to (from searchMessages). Enables reply draft mode.

folderPath.description: Folder URI or short path (e.g. 'account1/Inbox') of the message to reply to (required with messageId)

replyAll.description: Reply to all recipients (default: false). Only used with messageId.

forward.description: Forward mode (default: false). When true with messageId/folderPath, creates a forward draft with original message body and attachments.

attachments.description: Array of file paths to attach
